questionHtml:
Which statement about atomic nuclei is correct?

The density is…


A.  directly proportional to mass number.

B.  inversely proportional to nuclear radius.

C.  inversely proportional to volume.

D.  constant for all nuclei.

meta.title: Which statement about atomic nuclei is correct? The density is… A. directly proportional to mass number. B. inversely proportional to nuclear radius. C. inversely proportional to v
